title: VPN Access Request & Setup
summary: How to request, approve and configure VPN access for users.
purpose: Ensure VPN access is granted only to authorised users, correctly configured, and revoked when no longer needed.
scope: All Circle Gas employees and contractors requiring remote network access.

roles.responsibility: Submits the VPN access request with manager approval.
Reviews and approves all VPN access requests.

steps.title: Submit VPN access request
steps.description: The employee submits a VPN Access Request via the IT helpdesk portal, including: business justification, duration required, and line manager approval.
steps.notes: Requests without manager approval will be rejected automatically.

steps.title: IT Manager reviews and approves
steps.description: IT Manager reviews the request for business need and security risk. Approves or rejects within 1 business day. For contractor accounts, a fixed-term expiry date must be set.
steps.notes: Contractor VPN access must never be indefinite — maximum 90 days per request.

steps.title: Add user to VPN security group
steps.description: In Active Directory, add the approved user to the VPN_Users security group. This grants access to the VPN gateway policy in the firewall.
steps.notes: Do not manually configure firewall rules — group membership controls access automatically.
checklist: User added to VPN_Users AD group

steps.title: Install and configure VPN client
steps.description: If not already installed via Intune, install the approved VPN client (GlobalProtect / OpenVPN — see IT Glue for current approved client). Provide the user with the gateway address and connection guide.
steps.notes: Always use the VPN client version specified in IT Glue. Do not use older versions.

steps.title: Test and confirm access
steps.description: Ask the user to connect to the VPN and confirm they can access required internal resources. Test from outside the office network. Close the ticket once confirmed.
steps.notes: If connection fails, check AD group replication, firewall policy, and MFA status.

changeHistory.author: IT Engineer
changeHistory.notes: Added 90-day cap for contractor access. Added MFA check to troubleshooting.
